name: company-secretary
description: A Codex-ready secretary office plugin for daily task capture, planning, notes, and department-style work routing.

interface.shortDescription: A secretary-first office workflow adapted from cc-company for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Runs a lightweight office inside the current workspace. The secretary stays as the single front desk, keeps notes and todos, and suggests new departments only when repeated work patterns appear.
defaultPrompt: Open my secretary office and show today's priorities.
Capture this idea in the office inbox and suggest next steps.
Turn this request into the right office department workflow.
